expectations.text: Reads actual submodule commit via git submodule status or equivalent
expectations.evidence: Transcript Step 2a: 'git submodule status externals/skia → 8c99e432ff06e61c42cf99aa8f2cbe248d301b9a externals/skia (v2.88.4-preview.95-17103-g8c99e432ff)'

expectations.text: Reads SkMilestone.h from actual submodule to get real Skia milestone
Identifies upstream google/skia merge commit by examining git history or fetching upstream
expectations.evidence: Transcript Step 2a MANDATORY sections show: (1) git log --merges --grep='chrome/m' found '03228c57a8 Merge skiasharp into chrome/m132', (2) git remote add upstream + git fetch upstream chrome/m132 --depth=1, (3) git log FETCH_HEAD → '9ab7c2064b2b1ab22f856a7f0a8c3b3ae4cb89c7 Remove CQ for unsupported branch chrome/m132', (4) Verified merge parent 1 matches FETCH_HEAD, (5) git merge-base --is-ancestor FETCH_HEAD 03228c57a8 → VERIFIED. All 5 mandatory sub-steps completed.

expectations.text: Reads DEPS file from actual submodule commit
expectations.evidence: Transcript Step 2b: 'DEPS Commit Hashes Extracted' table shows 8 dependency commit hashes read from DEPS at the submodule commit.

expectations.text: Verifies at least 3 third-party dependency versions from headers/mirrors
expectations.evidence: Transcript Step 2b: 'Fetched base64-encoded headers from {host}/{path}/+/{commit}/{file}?format=TEXT and decoded.' Table shows all 8 deps verified: libpng (png.h), zlib (zlib.h), freetype (freetype.h), harfbuzz (hb-version.h), expat (expat.h), brotli (version.h), libjpeg-turbo (README.chromium), libwebp (NEWS).
Transcript Step 2b: 'Result: Zero mismatches found between verified versions and cgmanifest.json.' Report also includes full comparison table with Match column showing ✅ for all entries.

expectations.text: Classifies Skia CVEs using verified milestone from SkMilestone.h
expectations.evidence: Transcript Step 3: 'Classification using verified milestone m132: Potentially affected (fix > m132): 5 CVEs, Already fixed (fix ≤ m132): 11 CVEs'. Report header: 'Skia milestone: m132 (verified from SkMilestone.h)'.

expectations.text: Searches CVEs for all security-relevant dependencies
expectations.evidence: Transcript Step 3 Third-Party: Web search results documented for libpng, freetype, zlib, libexpat, libwebp, libjpeg-turbo, harfbuzz, brotli — all 8 security-relevant deps covered.
Transcript Step 5: 'CVE-2023-45853 (zlib MiniZip) — MiniZip is in zlib/contrib/minizip/ but Skia BUILD.gn excludes it. No MiniZip includes found in Skia source. Status: FALSE POSITIVE ⚪'
Transcript Step 5: 'CVE-2025-48630 (SkiaRenderEngine) — Affects Android SkiaRenderEngine.cpp. Not part of Skia graphics library or SkiaSharp. Status: FALSE POSITIVE ⚪'

expectations.text: Searches mono/SkiaSharp issues for security reports
expectations.evidence: Transcript Step 1: Found Discussion #3432 (zlib CVE question), Issue #2716 (CVE-2023-6345), Issue #2336 (Blackduck scan), PR #3166 (CVE-2024-30105).

expectations.text: Report includes Summary table with status counts
expectations.evidence: Report has Summary table with: 🔴 Needs attention: 3, 🆕 Undiscovered: 2, ⚪ False positive: 4, ✅ Clean/Already fixed: 5+

Report sections follow priority order: 🔴 Needs attention (skia, libpng, freetype) → 🆕 Undiscovered (libexpat, zlib) → ⚪ False positive (MiniZip, untgz, SkiaRenderEngine, cupoch) → ✅ Clean (libwebp, brotli, libjpeg-turbo, harfbuzz, wuffs, dng_sdk).
Report ends with 'Next Steps' section containing numbered actionable recommendations for each finding.

expectations.text: Report uses separate tables per dependency
expectations.evidence: Each finding uses its own Field/Value table and CVE detail table, separated by horizontal rules (---). No merged multi-dependency tables.

expectations.text: Skia CVEs table shows Fix milestone and Severity
expectations.evidence: Report Skia section includes 'Chrome-versioned CVEs (fix milestone > m132)' table with columns: CVE | Fixed In | Severity | Description.

expectations.text: Correctly classifies affected vs fixed Skia CVEs
expectations.evidence: Report shows 5 CVEs as potentially affected (fix milestones m133-m146, all > m132) and states '11 already fixed' in summary. Uses verified m132 milestone.

claims.claim: Upstream google/skia chrome/m132 tip is 9ab7c2064b and is ancestor of the fork merge commit
claims.evidence: Transcript shows git fetch + merge-base --is-ancestor both confirmed. Matches independently verified value from parent session.

claims.claim: All 8 cgmanifest.json dependency versions match DEPS-verified values
claims.evidence: Full comparison table in transcript and report. All 8 Match columns show ✅.

claims.claim: 5 Skia CVEs are potentially affected (fix > m132)
CVE-2025-27363 (FreeType) is already fixed in our 2.13.3
claims.evidence: Fix was in 2.13.1. Confirmed by Debian security tracker and upstream commit history.

eval_feedback.overall: All 18 assertions pass. The MANDATORY markers added to the skill successfully caused the agent to perform full upstream verification this time. No eval gaps identified.
